title: Bring Gemini’s intelligence to AlloyDB using AI functions
summary: Google Cloud presented AlloyDB AI functions that integrate Gemini directly into SQL queries. Functions include ai.generate, ai.rank, ai.if, ai.forecast, ai.summarize, ai.agg_summarize, and ai.analyze_sentiment, with optimized performance and lower costs compared to row-at-a-time LLM calls.
writeup: This video covers AlloyDB's new AI functions, which embed Gemini directly into SQL workflows. It walks through the available functions: ai.generate, ai.rank, ai.if, ai.forecast, ai.summarize, ai.agg_summarize, and ai.analyze_sentiment. The key takeaway is that the optimized implementation delivers significant performance gains and cost reductions relative to row-at-a-time LLM calls, letting generation, ranking, forecasting, summarization, and sentiment analysis run inside the database.
